data.title: TCL Technology adopts Global Code of Conduct in effort to enhance corporate governance and ethical standards.
data.description: TCL Technology, based in Shenzhen, China, has recently unveiled a new initiative on October 24, 2025, aimed at enhancing its corporate positioning in conjunction with ongoing board and talent management initiatives. The company has officially implemented a holistic Global Code of Conduct, highlighting its dedication to upholding ethical standards. This strategic move demonstrates TCL's effort to prioritize ethical practices within its operations.

data.title: AgiBot introduces LinkCraft platform, turning human motion videos into robot performances with world's first zero-code system.
data.description: AgiBot, a prominent company in humanoid robotics, introduced LinkCraft in Shanghai on Oct. 24, 2025. This innovative platform is the world's pioneer in effortless robot content creation, requiring zero coding skills. By integrating AI technology, LinkCraft empowers individuals to design personalized humanoid robot shows with ease.

data.title: Fetch.ai and Ocean Protocol decided to return $120M in FET tokens to prevent legal disputes. FET token value plummeted 93% post merger of ASAI, which founder says is not linked to Ocean Protocol.
data.description: The value of the FET token has plummeted by more than 93% following the amalgamation of the Artificial Superintelligence Alliance. The founder of the alliance has stated that this substantial decrease is not connected to any actions taken by Ocean Protocol.
UK OCT. COMPOSITE PMI RISES TO 51.1; FORECAST 50.5

data.title: HCA Healthcare expects to report $5.73 per share on revenue of $18.56 billion for Q3 earnings release. Wall Street analysts revised forecast.
data.description: On Friday, October 24, HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: HCA) will announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens. Analysts predict the Nashville-based company will report earnings of $5.73 per share, a rise from $4.90 per share a year ago. The consensus estimate for HCA Healthcare's quarterly revenue is $18.56 billion, compared to $17.49 billion in the previous year. In the second quarter, HCA Healthcare exceeded earnings expectations. Closing at $440.16 on Thursday, HCA Healthcare’s shares dropped by 0.2%. For further details, readers can find the complete story on Benzinga.com, where they also access the most recent analyst ratings.

data.title: DMEGC Solar in China received two SSI ESG Silver certifications in Jiangsu Province, demonstrating sustainability leadership.
data.description: In Jinhua, China on October 24, 2025, DMEGC Solar made notable progress in sustainable development when its module bases in Sihong and Lianyungang, Jiangsu Province, successfully completed an audit by the Solar Stewardship Initiative (SSI) on October 15. This achievement marks a significant milestone for DMEGC Solar with their operations in these locations meeting the required standards set by the SSI.

data.title: Crowded, a Miami-based fintech platform for nonprofits, makes CB Insights' 2025 Fintech 100 list for its donation transparency amid scandal.
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida on October 24, 2025, Crowded is gaining recognition for its cutting-edge financial management platform designed specifically for nonprofits. The company is reaffirming its dedication to maintaining donation transparency in light of a recent scandal within the industry. CB Insights has spotlighted Crowded, a fintech platform located in Miami, for its innovative approach.

data.title: $63 billion invested in green tech mining in China, leading to discovery of 150 mineral deposits during 2021-25.
data.description: In the last five years of China's 14th Five-Year Plan (2021-25), approximately 450 billion yuan (equivalent to $63 billion) has been dedicated to mineral exploration, leading to the discovery of 150 new mineral deposits across the country. This data was disclosed by the Ministry of Natural Resources, indicating significant investment and progress in the mineral sector during this period.
TURKEY COURT RULING ALLOWS MAIN OPPOSITION LEADER TO STAY

data.title: General Dynamics to release Q3 earnings on Oct. 24. Expected earnings per share: $3.71, up from $3.35 last year. Revenue estimate: $12.53 billion, up from $11.67 billion. Stock rose 1% to close at $341.50.
data.description: On Friday, Oct. 24, General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE: GD) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens. Analysts predict the Reston-based company will post earnings of $3.71 per share, an increase from $3.35 per share last year. The consensus forecast for General Dynamics' quarterly revenue stands at $12.53 billion, up from $11.67 billion a year ago. General Dynamics Land Systems, a subsidiary, and Parry Labs recently disclosed a collaborative agreement to speed up digital integration in combat platforms. The company's stock price rose by 1% to reach $341.50 on Thursday. For more analyst ratings and updates, readers can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: Indian exchange WazirX to resume trading after 16-month halt post $230M hack by Lazarus Group, per CoinMarketCap.
data.description: After a hiatus of 16 months following a $230 million hack by the Lazarus Group, WazirX, a crypto exchange based in India, is set to resume trading. The platform's reopening comes as reported by CoinMarketCap.

data.title: Iron Software offers $10,000 to .NET developers for creating PDF workflows with C#. Federal agencies adopt .NET solutions.
data.description: Iron Software recently revealed the IronPDF Developer Writing Contest in Chicago on October 24, 2025. The contest is open to.NET developers who can win up to $10,000 in cash and prizes. Participants are required to provide tutorials and insights on their use of C# to develop PDFs in operational settings. This initiative aims to...

data.title: Bitcoin struggles in October, at risk of first 'red' month in 8 years. Bulls fear 'worst Uptober ever' despite local trading peak.
data.description: Bitcoin continued to decline despite reaching the upper end of its recent trading range, prompting concerns from bullish investors who labeled it as the "worst Uptober ever."

data.title: Study of 13,560 patients shows DecisionDx®-Melanoma stratifies risk across subtypes, data to be presented at conference.
data.description: At the 25th Annual Fall Clinical Dermatology Conference, Castle is showcasing data on DecisionDx®-Melanoma and its upcoming atopic dermatitis (AD) test. The presentation includes significant statistics and findings related to these tests, highlighting the potential impact on dermatological research and diagnosis. Castle's involvement in this conference reflects its commitment to advancing innovation and improvements in the field of dermatology.

data.title: UAE starts 24/7 renewable energy project, aims to set global standard. Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed's vision drives project.
data.description: In accordance with the vision of Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, President of the UAE, a groundbreaking project has been launched to underscore the country's prominent role in clean energy. This world-first initiative aims to tackle the issue of intermittency in renewables and transform the possibilities of renewable energy. The project is set to solidify the UAE's leadership in this sector.
